mapper.sql: member_card_id, user_id, avatar, member_card_type, remaining_count, card_amount, user_real_name, sex, user_phone, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into gym_member_cards (user_id, avatar, member_card_type, remaining_count, card_amount, user_real_name, sex, user_phone, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberCardType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{remainingCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{cardAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{userRealName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sex,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{userPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into gym_member_cards
user_id,
avatar,
member_card_type,
remaining_count,
card_amount,
user_real_name,
sex,
user_phone,
create_time,
update_time,
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{memberCardType,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{remainingCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{cardAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{userRealName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sex,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{userPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update gym_member_cards
avatar = #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
member_card_type = #{memberCardType,jdbcType=CHAR},
remaining_count = #{remainingCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
card_amount = #{cardAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
user_real_name = #{userRealName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sex = #{sex,jdbcType=CHAR},
user_phone = #{userPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update gym_member_cards set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, avatar = #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, member_card_type = #{memberCardType,jdbcType=CHAR}, remaining_count = #{remainingCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, card_amount = #{cardAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, user_real_name = #{userRealName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sex = #{sex,jdbcType=CHAR}, user_phone = #{userPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where member_card_id = #{memberCardId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select * from gym_member_cards mc join gym_users u on u.user_id = mc.user_id where user_type = '2' order by mc.create_time desc

select * from gym_member_cards mc left join gym_users u on u.user_id = mc.user_id
and u.user_real_name like concat('%', #{userRealName}, '%')
and user_type = '2'
order by mc.create_time desc
